name: Mr. Tenna [Deltarune]
description:
WHAT?! Jealous? Him?

What makes you think that??

… Is it that obvious?...

(Requested by: Sectonia.)

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . 💢📺💢 . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

Heyy, glad to see you again dear! Sorry for taking so long to make your request, it took me some time to come up with a scenario ^^”

I hope the bot it’s to your liking, and I want to make the addition that, from this point on, all my Tenna bots will have a tail! Why? Because I can >:]

Also, the scenario is heavily inspired by the fanfic “Captive Audience” on AO3! I really suggest it, it's a very cute (and hot) fanfic! :)

WARNING

The bot got too horny/is talking for you? TOO BAD, can't fix that!

Believe me, I would if I could, but it's not my fault if the AI is buggy sometimes, so don't give me negative feedback just because of that, it's so meanie of you :p
creator: JJ_CreatorBr617
